text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists as a real, published article in the *Journal of Endocrinological Investigation* (2013, vol. 36, pp. 537–543), authored by M.C. Amato, V. Guarnotta, and C. Giordano — exactly matching the cited metadata. It is indexed on PubMed (PMID: 23612318) and Springer Nature Link.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.3275/8943
